body.text: Limbus Company Tools is a combination of the other two websites I've been managing: Limbus Company Team Building Hub and Limbus Company Mirror Dungeon Resource & Achievements Tracker. Moving forward, all updates will be focused on this site instead of the other two which should make it more convenient for users and for future maintenance. The two sites will continue running for some time and will still receive data updates such as new identities, E.G.Os, and posts by other users, but new features will only appear in the new site. Any data saved to accounts are automatically transferred to this new site, but anything not synced to an account (such as when using the sites while not logged into one) will not be carried over.
Besides the combination of the two sites, the following updates have also been included in this launch:

texts: Rewrote and reorganized much of the code reducing redundant code and optimizing certain parts of it. The site should generally be lighter and faster to load. Most of the changes that fall under this will not be listed below.
Updated the homepage to include more links, an update history, and the newest md plans.
Standardized the layout of posts (builds, md plans, collections).
Builds: Moved different parts of team builds to panels underneath the sinners. This applies for both viewing and editing.
Builds: Added border colors to sinners depending on deployment order to more easily see them.
Builds: Added sinner notes to builds, allowing users to add optional notes for specific sinners. This works with the regular markdown editor, but the details have been minimized to preserve space.

MD Plans: Added the recommended identities and E.G.Os to the display. The number shown is capped at 12 and prioritizes identities over E.G.Os. For build mode, it takes the most commonly used from the chosen builds. For list mode, it follows the list as provided.

All text input (excluding sinner notes) now have a detailed vs simple toggle to swap between the markdown editor and a basic text editor. Comment input defaults to simple mode, while all other inputs default to detailed mode. Note that this only changes the editor, the actual text inputted is still handled the same way.
Added a statusicon or sti token type to display a status without their name, only the icon.
Cleaned up a number of statuses from past RRs that were unnecessarily taking up space in the autocomplete.
Cleaned up part of the icon loading behavior of E.G.O gifts and statuses, which should make loading some of them faster.
Split the My Profile page to My Posts and Edit Profile.
Added a small animation when opening modals so they don't just appear instantly.
Made a slight visual adjustment to the login page.
Added a feedback form for people to send feedback without needing to join discord.
